channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Dispatch tackles Nintendo's Switch censorship requirements with a brilliantly named HR Violations update and an oozing jam donut where the dong should be - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Dispatch tackles Nintendo's Switch censorship requirements with a brilliantly named HR Violations update and an oozing jam donut where the dong should be  Eurogamer
  2. Dispatch Developer Finally Addresses 'What the F*** Happened' With Its Controversial Switch Censorship, and Releases Patch That Provides More Options — Though 'Some Hard Requirements From Nintendo' Remain  IGN
  3. Dispatch just got a Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update to reduce censorship  Nintendo Everything
  4. Dispatch finally lets Switch players see "breasts, butts and obscene gestures" in free HR Violations DLC  Gamereactor UK
  5. The Dispatch Team Is Restoring Some of the Switch Version’s Missing Mature Content  Comics Gaming Magazine

item.title: Google has ended Nest Mini and Nest Audio production, discontinuing both speakers - 9to5Google
item.description:

  3. Exclusive: The Google Nest Mini and Nest Audio are discontinued  Tech Advisor

  5. Google's Nest Audio and Mini are officially discontinued, but here's what that actually means  Android Police
